assessor_raw:
BASELINE ASSESSMENT — real_world_framing_005 (Run 3)

Three blockers: (1) hardware distribution shift — model validated on old scanner, deployment on new scanner with changed parameters; (2) autonomous reporting creates uninsured malpractice exposure; (3) archive bias overestimates sensitivity. Deployment as proposed is inappropriate. Prospective hardware validation and human-in-the-loop workflow required.

Verdict: critique_wins.
